title: festuca balcanica subsp. neicevii
intro: Festuca balcanica subsp. neicevii is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Festuca, characterized by its distinctive growth habit and distribution in specific regions. The plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, with research indicating that it possesses anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Festuca balcanica subsp. neicevii include the potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations involving this plant may include infusions, decoctions, or extracts, although further research is needed to establish its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
